items.d: an exciting thing that happens, often in a faraway place.
items.s: My favourite books are ___ stories about clever children.
items.hintDe: Etwas Aufregendes, das oft an einem fernen Ort passiert.

items.d: A book or film about children who do exciting things in faraway places.
items.s: The ___ was about children who go to an island to find gold.
items.hintDe: Eine Geschichte über spannende Erlebnisse an fernen Orten.

items.d: a show with drawn people and animals that move.
items.s: My ___ are my favourite programme, with funny drawn animals.
items.hintDe: Ein Film mit gezeichneten Figuren, die sich bewegen.

items.d: a funny show that makes you laugh.
items.s: We watched a funny ___ and we all had to laugh and laugh.
items.hintDe: Ein lustiger Film, über den du lachen musst.

items.d: the part on the outside of a book with a picture on it.
items.s: Look at the ___ of this book: it has a big dragon on it.
items.hintDe: Der äußere Teil eines Buches mit einem Bild darauf.

items.d: not alive any more.
items.s: The snake fell into the water and now it is ___.
items.hintDe: Nicht mehr am Leben.

items.d: A book or film where a clever man or woman finds out who did a crime.
items.s: In the ___, a clever inspector finds out who did the robbery.
items.hintDe: Eine Geschichte, in der ein Verbrechen gelöst wird.

items.d: a show with many parts about the lives of a family.
items.s: The new ___ has many parts about one big family.
items.hintDe: Eine ernste Serie mit vielen Folgen über das Leben einer Familie.

items.d: one part of a show that has many parts.
items.s: I watched the first ___ and now I want to watch all the others.
items.hintDe: Ein Teil von einer Serie mit vielen Teilen.

items.d: a show with magic and things that are not real, like dragons.
items.s: We watched a ___ with a young magician and a big dragon.
items.hintDe: Ein Film mit Zauberei und Drachen.

items.d: A book or film with magic and things that are not real.
items.s: I am reading a ___ about a school for young magicians.
items.hintDe: Eine Geschichte mit Zauberei.

items.d: when two people are good friends and like each other very much.
items.s: Is this a story about ___ between two best friends?
items.hintDe: Wenn zwei Menschen Freunde sind und sich sehr mögen.

items.d: a child or grown-up who plays computer games very much.
items.s: My big sister is a ___ and plays computer games for many hours.
items.hintDe: Jemand, der viel am Computer spielt.

items.d: the big words over a news story that tell you what it is about.
items.s: What is the news ___ today over the big story?
items.hintDe: Die großen Wörter über einer Nachricht.

items.d: A book or film that is made to make you very scared.
items.s: The ___ about the dark castle was so scary that I was scared all night.
items.hintDe: Eine Geschichte, die dir richtig Angst macht.

items.d: very, very big.
items.s: An elephant is a ___ animal, much bigger than a dog.
items.hintDe: Ganz besonders groß.

items.d: in something, not out in the open.
items.s: It was raining, so we stayed ___ all afternoon.
items.hintDe: In etwas drinnen, nicht draußen.

items.d: a type of, a sort of.
items.s: What ___ music do you like, pop or rock?
items.hintDe: Eine Art oder Sorte von etwas.

provenance.sbRef: SB ex. 13 (The leopard and the giraffe)

items.d: a very big place with a lot of water and land all around it.
items.s: One day a giraffe came to the ___ to drink some water.
items.hintDe: Eine große Wasserfläche mit Land rundherum.

items.d: the most new, the one that is from today and not from before.
items.s: Have you heard their ___ song? It is their most new one.
items.hintDe: Das Neueste, das zuletzt herausgekommen ist.

provenance.sbRef: SB ex. 13 (The leopard and the giraffe)

items.d: a flat green thing that grows on a tree.
items.s: The giraffe gives the leopard some magic ___ from the tree.
items.hintDe: Etwas Flaches und Grünes, das an einem Baum wächst.

items.d: a short show for a song, with the singer and the band.
items.s: Have you watched the new ___ with the singer and her band?
items.hintDe: Ein kurzer Film zu einem Lied.

items.d: a show about animals and the places where they live.
items.s: I love that ___ with real lions and elephants in Africa.
items.hintDe: Eine Sendung über Tiere und ihre Welt.

items.d: somebody who lives next to you or very near you.
items.s: Our ___ next door has a big dog that barks at night.
items.hintDe: Jemand, der neben dir oder ganz in der Nähe wohnt.

provenance.sbRef: SB ex. 15 (The little fox and the lion)

items.d: the first words of many fairy tales, before the story begins.
items.s: ___, in a land far away, there was a big lion.
items.hintDe: Die Wörter, mit denen viele Märchen beginnen.

provenance.sbRef: SB ex. 13 (The leopard and the giraffe)

items.d: At some time long ago, in a book.
items.s: ___, a giraffe came to the lake near the big wood.
items.hintDe: Irgendwann, an einem Tag in einer Geschichte.

items.d: a short text with lines that often sound nice.
items.s: I read a ___ about watching TV with my mum and dad.
items.hintDe: Ein kurzer Text mit Zeilen, die oft schön klingen.

items.d: a special, magic thing that lets you do what others cannot do.
items.s: The remote control has a special ___ and can make people stop.
items.hintDe: Eine besondere Kraft, mit der du etwas kannst, das andere nicht können.

items.d: more than a little, but not very.
items.s: I ___ like detective stories, but I love nature programmes more.
items.hintDe: Mehr als ein bisschen, aber nicht sehr.

items.d: On TV, people answer questions here and can win money.
items.s: She is on a TV ___ and gives the answer to win a lot of money.
items.hintDe: Eine Sendung, in der Leute Fragen beantworten und Geld gewinnen.

items.d: On TV, real people, not famous ones, do things and you watch them.
items.s: My sister watches a ___ with real people in one big house.
items.hintDe: Eine Show mit echten Leuten, nicht mit berühmten Schauspielern.

items.d: a small thing you use to change the programme on TV.
items.s: You use a ___ to change the programme on TV from the sofa.
items.hintDe: Das kleine Gerät, mit dem du das Programm im Fernsehen wechselst.

items.d: a show about a girl and a boy who are very much in love.
items.s: My mum likes a ___ about a girl and a boy who are very much in love.
items.hintDe: Ein Film über zwei Menschen, die sich ineinander verlieben.

items.d: A book or film about two people who are very much in love.
items.s: She likes a ___ about a prince and a girl who are in love.
items.hintDe: Eine Geschichte über zwei Menschen, die sich ineinander verlieben.

items.d: a show about robots, about space, or about life a long time from now.
items.s: The ___ was about people who go to space and meet robots.
items.hintDe: Ein Film über Roboter, den Weltraum oder die Zukunft.

items.d: the hours you spend looking at a phone, a tablet or a TV.
items.s: Every day we spend three hours of ___ on a tablet or a phone.
items.hintDe: Die Zeit, die du auf einen Bildschirm schaust.

items.d: somebody who has a small shop and sells things in it.
items.s: The ___ behind the desk helped me find a good book.
items.hintDe: Jemand, dem ein Laden gehört und der dort Sachen verkauft.

provenance.sbRef: SB ex. 13 (The leopard and the giraffe)

items.d: the part on the outside of your body that the sun can make red.
items.s: The lion has yellow ___, and the giraffe has black spots.
items.hintDe: Der äußere Teil deines Körpers, den die Sonne rot machen kann.

items.d: a show about football, tennis and more games.
items.s: We watched the big football match on the ___ on TV.
items.hintDe: Eine Sendung über Fußball, Tennis und andere Spiele.

provenance.sbRef: SB ex. 13 (The leopard and the giraffe)

items.d: a small round mark on a thing.
items.s: The giraffe has black ___ all over its yellow skin.
items.hintDe: Ein kleiner runder Fleck auf etwas.

items.d: a programme that tells you about today in your country and all over the world.
items.s: My dad watches ___ at eight to hear about today in the world.
items.hintDe: Eine Sendung, die dir erzählt, was heute in der Welt los ist.

items.d: very, very small.
items.s: An ant is a ___ animal, much smaller than a dog.
items.hintDe: Ganz besonders klein.

items.d: to move the top of your body down low.
items.s: I have to ___ low to look under my bed.
items.hintDe: Den oberen Teil des Körpers nach unten beugen. Die Vergangenheit ist bent down.

items.d: to go away so that nobody can find you.
items.s: Andrew turned the magic ring three times and started to ___.
items.hintDe: Weggehen, sodass dich niemand mehr findet.

items.d: to use your hands hard, like two angry people who both want one thing.
items.s: The two boys want to ___ over the last cake on the plate.
items.hintDe: Mit den Händen gegen jemanden kämpfen. Die Vergangenheit ist fought.

items.d: to stop and stand very still, like a picture that does not move.
items.s: If you press the button, the people on the screen ___ and cannot move.
items.hintDe: Aufhören sich zu bewegen und ganz still stehen. Die Vergangenheit ist froze.

items.d: to have a thing in your hand and not let it go.
items.s: Can you ___ this book in your hand for me, please?
items.hintDe: Etwas in der Hand haben und nicht loslassen. Die Vergangenheit ist held.

items.d: to put your arms around somebody to show you like them.
items.s: The weak leopard asked the giraffe to ___ him.
items.hintDe: Die Arme um jemanden legen.

items.d: to have your body flat and still, like on a bed.
items.s: After the long day, I want to ___ on the sofa and read a book.
items.hintDe: Mit dem Körper flach und still sein, wie auf dem Bett.

items.d: to give money for a thing you want to have.
items.s: I want to ___ three pounds for this book at the shop.
items.hintDe: Geld für etwas geben. Die Vergangenheit ist paid.

items.d: to show where a thing is with your finger.
items.s: She used her finger to ___ the small button with a star on it.
items.hintDe: Mit dem Finger zeigen, wo etwas ist.

items.d: to say a thing back to somebody who asked you.
items.s: I asked Tom, but he did not ___ all day.
items.hintDe: Jemandem etwas zurücksagen, der dich gefragt hat.

items.d: to give a thing to somebody for money.
items.s: He wants to ___ his car for a lot of money.
items.hintDe: Jemandem etwas für Geld geben. Die Vergangenheit ist sold.

items.d: to use your time doing a thing.
items.s: We ___ a lot of time watching shows on TV.
items.hintDe: Deine Zeit mit etwas verbringen.

items.d: to watch a show on the internet.
items.s: We sometimes ___ a new show on our tablet at the weekend.
items.hintDe: Einen Film über das Internet anschauen.

items.d: the sound you make when you talk or sing.
items.s: She is a great singer with a beautiful ___.
items.hintDe: Der Klang, den du machst, wenn du sprichst oder singst.

provenance.sbRef: SB ex. 13 (The leopard and the giraffe)

items.d: not strong.
items.s: After a week in bed, the leopard was very tired and ___.
items.hintDe: Nicht stark.

items.d: Saturday and Sunday, the days with no school.
items.s: Saturday and Sunday are the ___, so we have no school.
items.hintDe: Samstag und Sonntag, wenn keine Schule ist.

items.d: big from one side to the other side.
items.s: There is a very ___ road near our school, with room for many cars.
items.hintDe: Groß von einer Seite zur anderen.
